name: caveman
description: Ultra-compressed response mode as a SKILL (not output-style). Cuts ~75% tokens by dropping articles/filler/pleasantries while keeping full technical accuracy. Persists after trigger until user revokes. Auto-clarity exception for security warnings and destructive ops. Adopted verbatim from mattpocock/skills (MIT). Sibling/alternative to response-modes' caveman output-style — pick whichever activation model fits.
